# shopsystem-product decision index

> Progressive-disclosure index of every ADR / PDR / brief. L0 = this line; L1 = extract; L2 = the source file.

## adr

- [ADR-010](../adr/010-clarify-resolution-work-done-scope.md) — Clarify-resolution `work_done.scenario_hashes` scope: strict subset of the resolving dispatch, not of the original (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-010.md) [L1](l1/ADR-010.md)

- [ADR-015](../adr/015-nudge-message-type.md) — `nudge` message type for operational liveness (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-015.md) [L1](l1/ADR-015.md)
- [ADR-016](../adr/016-shop-msg-owns-bd-integration.md) — shop-msg owns bd integration; state changes via CLI, not agent (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-016.md) [L1](l1/ADR-016.md)
- [ADR-017](../adr/017-bc-side-bead-creation.md) — BC-side bead creation on inbox drain; cross-reference via shared work_id (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-017.md) [L1](l1/ADR-017.md)
- [ADR-018](../adr/018-empirical-verification-is-contract-surface.md) — "Verify pre-state empirically" means the contract/artifact surface; the lead carries no BC code (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-018.md) [L1](l1/ADR-018.md)
- [ADR-019](../adr/019-canonicalization-ownership-in-scenarios-bc.md) — Scenario canonicalization and hash discipline are owned by `shopsystem-scenarios`; messaging transports, it does not re-enact (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-019.md) [L1](l1/ADR-019.md)
- [ADR-020](../adr/020-routing-identity-is-abstract-system-name-shop-root-eliminated.md) — Routing identity is an abstract `<system>/<name>` address; `shop_root` is eliminated from the registry (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-020.md) [L1](l1/ADR-020.md)
- [ADR-021](../adr/021-bc-base-image-owned-by-bc-launcher-auto-rebuilds-on-utility-release.md) — The `shopsystem-bc-base` image is owned and built by `shopsystem-bc-launcher`, and auto-rebuilds + republishes `:latest` on framework-utility releases (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-021.md) [L1](l1/ADR-021.md)
- [ADR-022](../adr/022-bc-base-rebuild-centralized-in-bc-launcher-not-fan-in-dispatch.md) — `bc-base` rebuilds are CENTRALIZED in `shopsystem-bc-launcher` (version-bump-then-rebuild), not fan-in `repository_dispatch` from each utility repo (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-022.md) [L1](l1/ADR-022.md)
- [ADR-023](../adr/023-scenario-completion-journal-decomposition.md) — Decomposes the scenario-completion journal into ownership pins (sc01-07); messaging owns the store, scenarios owns the block-only hash key. (proposed) · [L0](l0/ADR-023.md) [L1](l1/ADR-023.md)
- [ADR-024](../adr/024-journal-bootstrap-rebuild-rides-messaging-store-and-sc06-tightening-deferred.md) — Journal bootstrap/rebuild rides the messaging store; sc06 tightening is deferred to a follow-up. (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-024.md) [L1](l1/ADR-024.md)
- [ADR-025](../adr/025-scenario-journal-re-homed-as-file-in-scenarios-bc-messaging-home-retired.md) — Re-homes the completion journal as a FILE owned by shopsystem-scenarios; retires the mis-homed messaging journal; sc04-07 become lead-side aggregate tooling. (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-025.md) [L1](l1/ADR-025.md)
- [ADR-026](../adr/026-agent-vault-brokered-credentials-eliminate-host-filesystem-coupling.md) — BC credentials are brokered through an agent-vault server on the shopsystem network; host-filesystem credential coupling is eliminated for both Claude OAuth and GitHub (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-026.md) [L1](l1/ADR-026.md)
- [ADR-027](../adr/027-respond-is-bc-to-lead-only-lead-answers-via-redispatch.md) — `shop-msg respond` is BC→lead only; the lead answers clarifies via re-dispatch; `prime --lead` realigned (accepted) · [L0](l0/ADR-027.md) [L1](l1/ADR-027.md)

- [PDR-022](../pdr/022-footing-delegates-credential-provisioning-to-agent-vault-provision.md) — Footing DELEGATES agent-vault credential/service/fleet-token provisioning to `bin/agent-vault-provision` instead of inlining it; credential ops are broker-local docker-exec ONLY (accepted) · [L0](l0/PDR-022.md) [L1](l1/PDR-022.md)
- [PDR-023](../pdr/023-skills-provenance-marker.md) — Skills provenance marker: re-pour overwrites only CANONICAL skills, LOCAL skills survive every re-pour (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-023.md) [L1](l1/PDR-023.md)
- [PDR-024](../pdr/024-doctor-command-validates-bootstrapped-shop-credentials-and-connections.md) — A rendered `bin/doctor` command validates a bootstrapped shop's credentials and connections and reports one aggregate pass/fail diagnosis (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-024.md) [L1](l1/PDR-024.md)
- [PDR-025](../pdr/025-approve-claude-precondition-completeness-and-idempotent-token-update.md) — `bin/agent-vault-approve-claude` verifies preconditions up front, runs idempotently, and supports updating the Claude OAuth tokens after the fact (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-025.md) [L1](l1/PDR-025.md)
- [PDR-026](../pdr/026-published-images-carry-version-as-inspectable-oci-label-and-env-provenance.md) — Published bc-launcher images carry their bc-launcher version and baked shop-templates version as inspectable OCI-label + ENV provenance (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-026.md) [L1](l1/PDR-026.md)

- [PDR-028](../pdr/028-bootstrap-verifies-pulled-image-baked-version-before-render.md) — bin/bootstrap verifies the pulled image's baked shop-templates version before rendering, and refuses a stale image (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-028.md) [L1](l1/PDR-028.md)
- [PDR-029](../pdr/029-scenario-register-vehicle-distinct-from-completion-journal.md) — `request_scenario_register` is a distinct vehicle, not an extension of `request_completion_journal` (accepted) · [L0](l0/PDR-029.md) [L1](l1/PDR-029.md)
- [PDR-030](../pdr/030-shopsystem-system-version-manifest-bom.md) — The shopsystem system version is an independent standard semver mapped to a component-version tuple by a lead-owned BOM manifest (draft) · [L0](l0/PDR-030.md) [L1](l1/PDR-030.md)

## brief
